code: import React,{useState}from'react';import BuyTable from'./BuyTable';import SellTable from'./SellTable';import TradeMeta from'./TradeMeta';import TradeStatusBadge from'./TradeStatusBadge';import AddLegButton from'./AddLegButton';import'./TradeRow.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function TradeRow(_ref){let{trade,onAddBuyLeg,onAddSellLeg,onDeleteLeg,onUpdateTradeStatus}=_ref;const[showBuyForm,setShowBuyForm]=useState(false);const[showSellForm,setShowSellForm]=useState(false);const isClosed=trade.status==='CLOSED';const handleAddBuyLeg=legData=>{onAddBuyLeg(trade.trade_id,legData);setShowBuyForm(false);};const handleAddSellLeg=legData=>{onAddSellLeg(trade.trade_id,legData);setShowSellForm(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`trade-row trade-${trade.direction.toLowerCase()}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"trade-column buy-column",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"column-header",children:"BUY"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BuyTable,{legs:trade.buy,tradeId:trade.trade_id,isClosed:isClosed,onDeleteLeg:onDeleteLeg}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AddLegButton,{legType:"buy",isOpen:showBuyForm,onToggle:()=>setShowBuyForm(!showBuyForm),onSubmit:handleAddBuyLeg,disabled:isClosed})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"trade-column trade-meta-column",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TradeMeta,{trade:trade,onStatusChange:newStatus=>onUpdateTradeStatus(trade.trade_id,newStatus)})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"trade-column sell-column",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"column-header",children:"SELL"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SellTable,{legs:trade.sell,tradeId:trade.trade_id,isClosed:isClosed,onDeleteLeg:onDeleteLeg}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AddLegButton,{legType:"sell",isOpen:showSellForm,onToggle:()=>setShowSellForm(!showSellForm),onSubmit:handleAddSellLeg,disabled:isClosed})]})]});}export default TradeRow;
